)

  metric_value
FROM g1b_values_source

WITH g1d_where_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    status_code,
    metric_value,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  status_code,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1d_where_source
WHERE status_code = 'ACTIVE'

WITH g1e_group_by_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) AS row_count,
  SUM(metric_value) AS metric_value_sum
FROM g1e_group_by_source
GROUP BY business_key

patterns.sql_template:
WITH g1f_having_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  CAST(COUNT(*) AS BIGINT) AS row_count,
  SUM(metric_value) AS metric_value_sum
FROM g1f_having_source
GROUP BY business_key
HAVING SUM(metric_value) > 0
  AND COUNT(*) >= 2

patterns.sql_template:
WITH g1g_qualify_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY event_ts DESC
  ) AS business_key_rank
FROM g1g_qualify_source
QUALIFY business_key_rank = 1
patterns.authoring_notes: Valid reusable pattern when it matches the required business logic.

WITH g1p_pivot_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    metric_name,
    metric_value

)

  business_key,

patterns.sql_template:
WITH
  g1r_cte_source AS (
    SELECT
      business_key,
      metric_value,
      event_ts
    FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
  ),
  g1r_cte_filtered AS (
    SELECT
      business_key,
      metric_value,
      event_ts
    FROM g1r_cte_source
    WHERE metric_value IS NOT NULL
  ),
  g1r_cte_ranked AS (
    SELECT
      business_key,
      metric_value,
      event_ts,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY business_key
        ORDER BY event_ts DESC
      ) AS business_key_rank
    FROM g1r_cte_filtered
  )
SELECT
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts
FROM g1r_cte_ranked
WHERE business_key_rank = 1
patterns.authoring_notes: Strong default pattern for this feature family.

patterns.sql_template:
WITH RECURSIVE g1s_recursive_tree(node_id, parent_node_id, depth_level) MAX RECURSION LEVEL 100 AS (
  SELECT
    node_id,
    parent_node_id,
    0 AS depth_level
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
  WHERE parent_node_id IS NULL

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    child.node_id,
    child.parent_node_id,
    parent.depth_level + 1 AS depth_level
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }} AS child
  INNER JOIN g1s_recursive_tree AS parent
    ON child.parent_node_id = parent.node_id
)
SELECT
  node_id,
  parent_node_id,
  depth_level
FROM g1s_recursive_tree
patterns.authoring_notes: Valid pattern, but use it intentionally because feature availability, performance, or platform behavior can matter.

patterns.sql_template:
WITH g1u_window_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    event_ts,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  business_key,
  event_ts,
  metric_value,
  SUM(metric_value) OVER metric_win AS running_metric_value,
  AVG(metric_value) OVER metric_win AS average_metric_value
FROM g1u_window_source
WINDOW metric_win AS (
  PARTITION BY business_key
  ORDER BY event_ts
  ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
)
patterns.authoring_notes: Valid reusable pattern when it matches the required business logic.

WITH g1w_lateral_alias_source AS (
  SELECT
    metric_value,
    adjustment_factor
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)

WITH g4o_asof_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    snapshot_date,
    metric_value
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<snapshot_table_name>') }}
),
g4o_asof_parameters AS (
  SELECT
    CAST('<as_of_date>' AS DATE) AS as_of_date
),
g4o_current_snapshot AS (
  SELECT
    business_key,
    snapshot_date,
    metric_value
  FROM g4o_asof_source
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY business_key
    ORDER BY snapshot_date DESC
  ) = 1
),
g4o_historical_snapshot AS (
  SELECT
    source_rows.business_key,
    source_rows.snapshot_date,
    source_rows.metric_value
  FROM g4o_asof_source AS source_rows
  CROSS JOIN g4o_asof_parameters AS parameters
  WHERE source_rows.snapshot_date <= parameters.as_of_date
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY source_rows.business_key
    ORDER BY source_rows.snapshot_date DESC
  ) = 1
)
SELECT
  current_snapshot.business_key,
  current_snapshot.snapshot_date AS current_snapshot_date,
  current_snapshot.metric_value AS current_metric_value,
  historical_snapshot.snapshot_date AS as_of_snapshot_date,
  historical_snapshot.metric_value AS metric_value_as_of_date,
  current_snapshot.metric_value - historical_snapshot.metric_value AS change_since_as_of_date
FROM g4o_current_snapshot AS current_snapshot
LEFT JOIN g4o_historical_snapshot AS historical_snapshot
  ON current_snapshot.business_key = historical_snapshot.business_key

WITH g4ah_session_source AS (

    user_id,
    event_ts
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g4ah_with_previous_event AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    event_ts,
    LAG(event_ts) OVER (
      PARTITION BY user_id
      ORDER BY event_ts ASC
    ) AS previous_event_ts
  FROM g4ah_session_source
),
g4ah_session_flags AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    event_ts,
    CASE
      WHEN previous_event_ts IS NULL THEN 1
      WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, previous_event_ts, event_ts) > <session_gap_minutes> THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS is_new_session
  FROM g4ah_with_previous_event
),
g4ah_session_numbers AS (
  SELECT
    user_id,
    event_ts,
    SUM(is_new_session) OVER (
      PARTITION BY user_id
      ORDER BY event_ts ASC
      ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS session_number
  FROM g4ah_session_flags
)
SELECT
  user_id,
  session_number,
  MIN(event_ts) AS session_start_ts,
  MAX(event_ts) AS session_end_ts,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count_in_session
FROM g4ah_session_numbers
GROUP BY user_id, session_number

patterns.sql_template:
WITH g11i_cdf_changes_raw AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    metric_value,
    event_ts,
    _change_type,
    _commit_version,
    _commit_timestamp
  FROM table_changes('`target_catalog`.`target_schema`.`source_delta_table`', 0)
),
g11i_cdf_changes_filtered AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    business_key,
    CAST(metric_value AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value,
    CAST(event_ts AS TIMESTAMP) AS event_ts,
    _change_type,
    _commit_version,
    _commit_timestamp,
    CASE
      WHEN _change_type = 'insert' THEN 'I'
      WHEN _change_type = 'update_postimage' THEN 'U'
      WHEN _change_type = 'delete' THEN 'D'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS op_code,
    CASE WHEN _change_type = 'delete' THEN true ELSE false END AS is_deleted,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g11i_cdf_changes_raw
  WHERE _change_type IN ('insert', 'delete', 'update_postimage')
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  business_key,
  metric_value,
  event_ts,
  _change_type,
  _commit_version,
  _commit_timestamp,
  op_code,
  is_deleted,
  load_dttm
FROM g11i_cdf_changes_filtered
ORDER BY
  _commit_version,
  _commit_timestamp
patterns.authoring_notes: Requires a Delta table with CDF enabled and appropriate retention for the change window being consumed.

patterns.sql_template:
WITH g13r_information_schema_tables AS (
  SELECT
    table_catalog,
    table_schema,
    table_name,
    table_type,
    table_owner,
    comment AS table_comment,
    data_source_format,
    storage_path,
    created AS table_created_ts,
    last_altered AS table_last_altered_ts
  FROM system.information_schema.tables
  WHERE table_catalog = '<catalog_name>'
    AND table_schema = '<schema_name>'
),
g13r_information_schema_columns AS (
  SELECT
    table_catalog,
    table_schema,
    table_name,
    column_name,
    ordinal_position,
    full_data_type,
    data_type,
    is_nullable,
    partition_ordinal_position,
    comment AS column_comment
  FROM system.information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_catalog = '<catalog_name>'
    AND table_schema = '<schema_name>'
),
g13r_information_schema_inventory AS (
  SELECT
    t.table_catalog,
    t.table_schema,
    t.table_name,
    t.table_type,
    t.table_owner,
    t.table_comment,
    t.data_source_format,
    t.storage_path,
    t.table_created_ts,
    t.table_last_altered_ts,
    c.ordinal_position,
    c.column_name,
    c.full_data_type,
    c.data_type,
    CASE WHEN c.is_nullable = 'YES' THEN true ELSE false END AS is_nullable,
    c.partition_ordinal_position,
    c.column_comment,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS load_dttm
  FROM g13r_information_schema_tables t
  INNER JOIN g13r_information_schema_columns c
    ON t.table_catalog = c.table_catalog
   AND t.table_schema = c.table_schema
   AND t.table_name = c.table_name
)
SELECT
  table_catalog,
  table_schema,
  table_name,
  table_type,
  table_owner,
  table_comment,
  data_source_format,
  storage_path,
  table_created_ts,
  table_last_altered_ts,
  ordinal_position,
  column_name,
  full_data_type,
  data_type,
  is_nullable,
  partition_ordinal_position,
  column_comment,
  load_dttm
FROM g13r_information_schema_inventory
ORDER BY
  table_catalog,
  table_schema,
  table_name,
  ordinal_position
patterns.authoring_notes: Safe metadata read pattern for governed diagnostics, inventory, and schema verification work.

WITH g15k_ai_forecast_source AS (
  SELECT
    business_unit,
    event_date,
    revenue_amount
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
),
g15k_ai_forecast_observed AS (
  SELECT
    business_unit,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE) AS ds,
    SUM(CAST(revenue_amount AS DOUBLE)) AS revenue
  FROM g15k_ai_forecast_source
  GROUP BY
    business_unit,
    CAST(event_date AS DATE)
)
SELECT
  ds,
  business_unit,
  revenue_forecast,
  revenue_upper,
  revenue_lower
FROM ai_forecast(
  TABLE(g15k_ai_forecast_observed),
  horizon => '<forecast_horizon_date>',
  time_col => 'ds',
  value_col => 'revenue',
  group_col => 'business_unit',
  prediction_interval_width => 0.9,
  parameters => '{"global_floor": 0}'
)
